case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. JOSE ANTONIO DE LEON ALFARO

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY KNOWN AS PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-12-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-12-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY LENIA RODRIGUEZ--LEGAL ASSISTANT COLLECTION DEPT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-12-2015 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$45.00) SERVED MAR-21-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DE LEON ALFARO, JOSE ANTONIO

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY KNOWN AS PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) AS TO DEFENDANT DE LEON ALFARO, JOSE ANTONIO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-12-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY KNOWN AS PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DE LEON ALFARO, JOSE ANTONIO $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $95.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,595.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
